'''Karideph''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Karideph system/Legends|Karideph system]], a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories's]] resource-rich [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]]. Home of the insectoid [[Kari]] [[Species/Legends|species]], Karideph's surface was almost entirely dominated by gardens and agricultural fields that provided for the planet's population of more than 88 billion. Discovered by the greater [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] alongside the rest of the Minos Cluster between [[3956 BBY]] and [[3681 BBY]], Karideph was the next stop along the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]] after [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]], and the [[Trition Trade Route]] branched off Karideph to connect the Minos Cluster and the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] to the Rimma. Karideph was [[Battle of Karideph|invaded]] by the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]] during the [[Great Galactic War]], but a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] counterattack under the command of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Orgus Din]] and the [[Republic Special Forces Division|Special Forces]]' [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Harron Tavus]] drove back the Imperial assault.

==Description==
Karideph was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Karideph system/Legends|Karideph system]] of the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]], a [[Star cluster/Legends|star cluster]] and [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The planet's surface was covered by rows upon rows of carefully tilled gardens, including the sides of Karideph's mountain ranges and the coasts of the planet's [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]]. By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], none of the planet's original wildlife or flora remained, as it all had been cultivated, and the crop fields were dotted by several massive [[City/Legends|cities]]. The upper levels of these cities had to be pressurized because of their incredible height, but the majority of Karideph's native [[Kari]] lived in the extensive tunnel systems beneath its surface—the deepest of which reached twelve [[Meter/Legends|kilometers]], almost breaking through the planet's crust.<ref name="Galaxy" /> Karideph was located at the far southern end of the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]],<ref name="Atlas" /> and the [[Trition Trade Route]] branched off of the Rimma to connect several important worlds in the Minos Cluster and the nearby [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]].<ref name="DarkStryder" />

==History==
Karideph was discovered sometime between the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3956 BBY]], the end of the [[Jedi Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] under the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Malak]],<ref name="Atlas" /> and [[3681 BBY]], the beginning of the [[Great Galactic War]] between the Republic and a [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]].<ref name="Encyclopedia">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]''</ref> By that point, the Rimma Trade Route had been extended out from [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]] as far as Karideph,<ref name="Atlas" /> bringing the resource-rich Minos Cluster into contact with the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Not long after the beginning of their war with the Republic, the Empire set their sights on the Minos Cluster's valuable resources and launched the [[Minos Cluster Campaign]], a military invasion that lasted the entire twenty-eight years of the conflict and saw both the Republic and the Empire gain advantages in the Cluster at different times in the war.<ref name="Timeline 6">{{TORweb|url=holonet/galactic-history|text=Timeline 6: Onslaught of the Sith Empire|int=Timeline 6: Onslaught of the Sith Empire}}</ref> Sometime between [[3667 BBY]] and [[3653 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]'' states that [[Harron Tavus]] was recruited into [[Havoc Squad]] after the [[Battle of Alderaan]] in [[3667 BBY]], meaning that [[Orgus Din]] and Tavus must have [[Battle of Karideph|fought]] together at Karideph sometime after 3667 BBY but before the end of the war in [[3653 BBY]].</ref> the Empire attempted an [[Battle of Karideph|invasion]] of Karideph, but the Republic launched a furious counterattack under the leadership of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Orgus Din]] and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Harron Tavus]] of the [[Republic Special Forces Division]]—a counterattack that led to a Republic victory and the pair being named the "Heroes of Karideph" by the native [[Kari]] and the Republic.<ref name="Encyclopedia" />

By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] over three thousand years later, the Empire had established an [[Imperial Enclave]] around the spaceport of the planet, guarded and patrolled by 200 Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends]] and governed by an Imperial [[Consul-General]]. During that time Karideph had become one of the Minos Cluster's major economic hubs—it imported a massive amount of small appliances, [[Droid/Legends|droid]] parts, and machine parts in exchange for raw materials and [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuffs]] to supply the Kari. The [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] species heavily overpopulated the planet by that point, with a population of at least 88 billion, and as a result almost the entire surface was devoted toward the production of food for Karideph's inhabitants.

A group of [[Scholar/Legends|scholars]] had founded on Kari the [[University of Universal Thought]] and around [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] they were engaged in an extended and highly-abstract discourse with the Kari group mind through one of the most respected [[Hatch|Hatches]] of the planet.
